Dialog.name: MSG_RemainTBoxTalk00
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5006 0 0}I sense a treasure chest. It looks like there's one at the end of the room.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}Можливо, всередині є щось цінне... Ти дійсно хочеш піти без неї?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_RemainTBoxTalk01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5006 0 0}There's still an unopened treasure chest... Do you want to leave without it?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_OPEN_DOOR_FIRST
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5061 0 0}Вибач, але чи не міг би ти витратити трохи більше часу на дослідження цієї області?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 -1 50 0 0}My powers aren't strong enough to see everything in there.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_NOT_EXIT
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}Чи не міг би ти дослідити це місце трохи далі?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_TUTO01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5006 0 0}There's still an unopened treasure chest. I think you should open it before leaving.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_TUTO_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 4 -1 50 0 0}It feels different in here compared to the outside.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 4 -1 50 0 0}This space is unstable and the walls are moving like waves...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_TUTO_1_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 -1 50 0 0}My powers aren't working very well here.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 -1 50 0 0}I can tell that it's not a very large area, but please still be careful.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_Monad03
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5003 0 0}Can you please return? I'd like to go through what we know about that door.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_Monad03_02
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 50 0 0}Дякую. Я буду чекати тебе на виході.[n]{f 1 1}
